name: Flowchart
code:
graph TD
    A[Start] --> B{Decision}
    B -->|Yes| C[Process]
    B -->|No| D[End]
    C --> D

name: Sequence Diagram
code:
sequenceDiagram
    Alice->>Bob: Hello Bob!
    Bob-->>Alice: Hi Alice!
    Alice->>Bob: How are you?
    Bob-->>Alice: Great!

name: Class Diagram
code:
classDiagram
    Animal <|-- Duck
    Animal <|-- Fish
    Animal : +int age
    Animal : +String gender
    Animal: +isMammal()
    Duck: +swim()
    Fish: +canEat()

name: State Diagram
code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> Idle
    Idle --> Processing : Start
    Processing --> Done : Complete
    Processing --> Error : Fail
    Error --> Idle : Reset
    Done --> [*]

name: Entity Relationship
code:
erDiagram
    CUSTOMER ||--o{ ORDER : places
    ORDER ||--|{ LINE-ITEM : contains
    CUSTOMER }|..|{ DELIVERY-ADDRESS : uses

name: Gantt Chart
code:
gantt
    title Project Plan
    dateFormat YYYY-MM-DD
    section Design
      Wireframes :a1, 2024-01-01, 7d
      Mockups    :a2, after a1, 5d
    section Dev
      Frontend   :b1, after a2, 10d
      Backend    :b2, after a2, 12d

name: Git Graph
code:
gitGraph
    commit
    commit
    branch develop
    checkout develop
    commit
    commit
    checkout main
    merge develop
    commit

name: User Journey
code:
journey
    title My Working Day
    section Go to work
      Make tea: 5: Me
      Go upstairs: 3: Me
      Do work: 1: Me, Cat
    section Go home
      Go downstairs: 5: Me
      Sit down: 5: Me

name: Mindmap
code:
mindmap
  root((Project))
    Planning
      Goals
      Timeline
    Development
      Frontend
      Backend
    Testing

name: Timeline
code:
timeline
    title History of Social Media
    2002 : LinkedIn
    2004 : Facebook : Google
    2005 : YouTube
    2006 : Twitter

name: Sankey
code:
sankey-beta
Agricultural waste,Bio-conversion,124.729
Bio-conversion,Liquid,0.597
Bio-conversion,Losses,26.862
Bio-conversion,Solid,280.322
Bio-conversion,Gas,81.144

name: XY Chart
code:
xychart-beta
    title "Sales Revenue"
    x-axis [jan, feb, mar, apr, may]
    y-axis "Revenue (k$)" 0 --> 150
    bar [52, 78, 65, 120, 95]
    line [52, 78, 65, 120, 95]

name: Block Diagram
code:
block-beta
  columns 3
  a["Frontend"]:2 b["Backend"]
  c["Database"] d["Cache"] e["Queue"]

name: Quadrant Chart
code:
quadrantChart
    title Reach and engagement
    x-axis Low Reach --> High Reach
    y-axis Low Engagement --> High Engagement
    quadrant-1 We should expand
    quadrant-2 Need to promote
    quadrant-3 Re-evaluate
    quadrant-4 May be improved
    Campaign A: [0.3, 0.6]
    Campaign B: [0.45, 0.23]
    Campaign C: [0.57, 0.69]
    Campaign D: [0.78, 0.34]

name: Requirement Diagram
C4 Context
code:
C4Context
    title System Context diagram for Internet Banking System
    Person(customerA, "Banking Customer A", "A customer of the bank")
    System(systemAA, "Internet Banking System", "Allows customers to view information about their bank accounts.")
    System_Ext(systemC, "E-mail system", "The internal e-mail system.")
    Rel(customerA, systemAA, "Uses")
    Rel(systemAA, systemC, "Sends e-mails", "SMTP")
